features.title: Getting Started
features.description: Welcome to the Incentive Management System. This platform automates commission tracking, performance analysis, and financial settlements.

features.title: Architecture & Security
features.description: The system uses Next.js for the core interface, Supabase for data integrity, and role-based access control (RBAC) to ensure data isolation.

features.title: Commission Blueprinting
features.description: Create and manage 'Schemes'. You can define Percentage, Tiered Bonus, or Fixed-per-unit logic. Use 'Soft Delete' to archive old logic without breaking history.

features.title: User Lifecycle
features.description: Manage staff profiles and assign them to specific schemes. Approving a user allows them to start logging sales.

features.title: Batch Settlement
features.description: Group earned commissions into 'Batches'. You can approve batches for payment or reject them with feedback if discrepancies are found.

features.title: Self-Logging Sales
features.description: Log your daily sales directly. The system automatically calculates your commission based on your assigned scheme.

features.title: Performance Dashboard
features.description: Track your targets, achieved sales, and total earnings in real-time. View your payout history and status of logged deals.

features.title: Adjustments Registry
features.description: View performance bonuses or manual corrections (deductions) applied to your account by the management.

features.title: Disbursement Queue
features.description: View batches that have been approved by the Admin. Execute partial or full payments and mark them as 'Paid'.

features.title: Financial Audit
features.description: Every financial transition is logged. You can review the status of every deal from 'Earned' to 'Paid' with full reference numbers.

features.title: Audit Logs
features.description: Every action (Login, Create, Update, Delete) is tracked to prevent fraud and ensure accountability.

features.title: Rate Limiting
features.description: The system includes built-in protection against brute-force attacks and bot traffic.
